title: Writing - Part 2: Exercise 1
description: Choose one of the following writing tasks and write your answer in 220-260 words.

tasks.title: Report
tasks.prompt: A local community organisation has asked you to write a report on the impact of a new shopping centre that opened in your area two years ago. Your report should describe the economic and social effects on the local community, both positive and negative, and make recommendations for how the relationship between the development and the local community could be improved.
tasks.modelAnswer:
Report on the Impact of the Riverside Shopping Centre on the Local Community

Introduction
This report examines the economic and social effects of the Riverside Shopping Centre, which opened two years ago on the former industrial land on the eastern edge of the town. Evidence was gathered through a community survey and consultation with local business owners.

Economic Effects
The development has generated approximately 350 permanent jobs, representing a significant boost to local employment. Tax revenue from the site has also contributed to council funding. However, smaller independent retailers on the high street have reported a marked decline in footfall since the centre opened, with three long-established businesses closing in the past twelve months. The concentration of spending in a single out-of-town location appears to be weakening the traditional commercial heart of the town.

Social Effects
For residents without private transport, the shopping centre presents accessibility challenges, as the bus service connecting it to the town centre is infrequent and expensive. Conversely, the centre's cinema and food court have provided new leisure facilities that the town previously lacked, particularly for younger residents.

Recommendations
To improve the relationship between the development and the wider community, the following is recommended:
- Introducing a shuttle bus service between the town centre and the shopping centre at subsidised rates.
- Establishing a community fund, financed by a percentage of the centre's profits, to support local independent businesses.
- Creating market space within the development for local traders to reach the centre's larger customer base.

Conclusion
With greater integration into the local economy, the Riverside Shopping Centre could become a genuine asset to the whole community rather than a competitor to it.

tasks.title: Email
tasks.prompt: You are organising a reunion for a group of former university friends. You have found a suitable country house venue for a weekend stay but need to gather information before confirming the booking. Write an email to the venue manager asking about availability, facilities, pricing, and any special arrangements that could be made for the group.
tasks.modelAnswer:
Dear Manager,

I am writing to enquire about the possibility of booking Briar House for a private group weekend stay. We are a group of fourteen former university friends planning a reunion, and your property appears to be an ideal setting for the occasion.

We are hoping to book for the weekend of 14th to 16th June, arriving on Friday evening and departing on Sunday afternoon. Could you please confirm whether the property is available on those dates, and, if not, whether you have availability on the following weekend instead?

I would also be grateful if you could clarify a few points regarding the facilities. The website mentions a kitchen available for guest use—could you let us know how well equipped it is, as some members of our group would enjoy the option to cook together? Additionally, we noticed that outdoor spaces are featured prominently in your photography. Are there fire pits or barbecue facilities available, and are these included in the standard rate or charged separately?

On the matter of pricing, could you provide a full breakdown of what is included in the quoted weekend rate, and whether there are any additional charges for linen, welcome packs, or access to specific areas of the property?

Finally, one member of our group has mobility difficulties and requires a ground-floor bedroom with step-free access. Could you confirm whether such accommodation is available?

Thank you for your assistance, and I look forward to your response.

Kind regards,
Fiona Carpenter

tasks.title: Review
tasks.prompt: An English-language website for expats is inviting reviews of local neighbourhood markets or food markets. Describe the market, the products available, the atmosphere, and whether you would recommend it to visitors or new residents. Write your review.
tasks.modelAnswer:
The Heartbeat of the City: Mercado Central

If you want to understand a city in an afternoon, skip the museums and go to its market. In Valencia, that means Mercado Central—a magnificent Art Nouveau structure that has been feeding and enchanting visitors since 1928 and shows absolutely no signs of diminishing.

The building itself is worth a visit before you even turn your attention to the produce. Its soaring iron dome, illuminated by stained glass skylights, creates an atmosphere that feels simultaneously like a cathedral and a carnival. The sensory experience upon entering—the mingling aromas of fresh seafood, citrus, aged cheese, and smoked meat—is one of those rare, immediate pleasures that no photograph can adequately convey.

The market houses around 300 stalls, many operated by the same families for generations. The quality of the produce is remarkable: tomatoes with genuine flavour, six varieties of locally grown citrus, and a fish counter that would prompt envy in any serious cook. Prices are considerably more competitive than supermarkets for equivalent quality, and the vendors are, without exception, willing to offer samples and advice.

My only caveat is that the market is best visited on a weekday morning; weekend afternoons attract large tourist crowds that can make the experience somewhat less relaxed.

For anyone newly arrived in Valencia, a Saturday morning visit to Mercado Central is not merely a shopping trip—it is an initiation into the city's soul. I cannot recommend it highly enough.
